title: Home Assistant history
subtitle: Import recorded temperature history per unit. Imports run in the background in date chunks, can be resumed, are de-duplicated, and never create live incidents.
prompt: Existing Home Assistant history is available. Import it now?
manageHint: Manage imports on the Storage Units page
detailPartial: Partially imported — see the Storage Units page

status.partial: Imported hourly statistics only (no minute-level precision)

noSensor: Assign a room-temperature sensor to enable history import.
